item.title: $6 gas and refinery fears collide with California’s climate ambitions
item.description:
California is considering giving oil refineries and other major polluters billions in free pollution permits under a major overhaul of its carbon market.
The fight is exposing a deeper question inside Gov. Gavin Newsom's climate agenda: Can California lower emissions without driving up gas prices?

The post $6 gas and refinery fears collide with California’s climate ambitions appeared first on Long Beach Post News.

item.title: Long Beach built a fence around its library. A homelessness committee says it’s a waste.
item.description:

item.source:markdown:

item.title: Fire in tunnel under 110 Freeway snarls traffic near the Port of Los Angeles
item.description:
The Los Angeles Fire Department started battling the difficult fire early Monday evening and said it believed it was started by people living in a homeless encampment.
